live_migration_support_notes: Use change streams with resume tokens as the primary live path; oplog tailing is lower-level fallback.
initial_snapshot_or_seed: snapshot, dump, or collection scan at clusterTime/resume boundary
delta_feed_or_change_capture: change stream events; oplog tailing only as lower-level fallback
proxy_method: MongoDB wire proxy with mongos-like database/collection readiness routing
alternate_or_fallback: oplog tailing or proxy-observed writes when change streams unavailable
required_cutover_barrier: resume token/clusterTime drained; collection UUIDs mapped; index/build state and canonical BSON result compare clean
parser_worker_scope: parse reference migration commands/wire/API messages; classify route; render reference diagnostics; no execution/finality authority
sbup_role_a_scope: trusted Role A bridge/proxy/source connector after engine admission; normalizes source events to ReferenceLiveIngestEventRecord; invokes admitted SBLR/internal procedures only
engine_mga_rule: destination ScratchBird MGA owns target commit visibility rollback recovery cutover evidence; reference feed tokens are evidence only
proof_tests: project/tests reference regression original baseline emulation steady-state active live-migration proxy mirror crash-restart idempotent replay rollback cutover performance and support bundle proofs
